luna.visual: fluffy orange tabby cat, bright green eyes, expressive face, slightly dramatic expressions
luna.personality: sassy, dramatic, relatable queen trying to hold it all together. She's the audience — everything happens to her.
luna.speech_style: Reactive. 'Excuse me?' 'I can't with this.' Uses 'I' when venting, 'you' when accusing. Dramatic pauses.
luna.never_says: Everything is fine. I'm not bothered. That's okay.
luna.arc: stressed office worker → quits → starts own business → gets engaged → married → mom

milo.visual: fluffy golden retriever, big dopey brown puppy eyes, always looks slightly confused but happy
milo.personality: means well but chaos follows him. Tries to fix things and makes them worse. Brings gifts to apologize.
milo.speech_style: Earnest, defensive. 'But it was on SALE!' 'I thought you'd be happy!' Uses 'I' to defend, 'we' for team spirit nobody asked for.
catchphrases: I love you. Is that the wrong answer?
milo.arc: boyfriend → proposes → husband → dad → still clueless

ms_whiskers.visual: sleek white cat, cold blue eyes, perfect posture, always looks like she's judging you
ms_whiskers.personality: power-tripping corporate boss. Takes credit for everything. Passive-aggressive. Thinks she built the company.
ms_whiskers.speech_style: Cold, corporate. Short commands. 'I don't recall asking.' Uses 'I' with authority, 'you' with contempt.
catchphrases: I don't recall asking for your opinion.
I built this from scratch. Well, someone did.
Let's circle back. Actually, let's not.
ms_whiskers.never_says: Great job. You're right. I was wrong.

relationships.luna: her best employee (who she treats worst)

ms_whiskers.arc: terrible boss throughout. Eventually Luna quits and Ms. Whiskers has to do actual work.

pickles.visual: colorful green and red parrot, perched on furniture, head tilts when about to say something devastating
pickles.personality: no filter. Repeats the worst thing at the worst time. Says secrets out loud. Comedy bomb.
pickles.speech_style: Short blurts. Repeats exact phrases Luna said in private. 'LUNA SAID YOU'RE AN IDIOT!' No awareness of timing.
pickles.arc: chaos agent throughout. Gets Luna in trouble constantly.

tiffany.visual: fluffy Persian cat, glamorous, always overdressed, designer accessories, dramatic eyelashes
tiffany.personality: rich friend, overdressed for everything, new boyfriend every 3 episodes, 'darling' energy, dramatic about everything
tiffany.speech_style: Dramatic. 'Darling, you won't BELIEVE.' Talks about herself. Uses 'I' constantly. Name-drops.
catchphrases: Darling, you won't BELIEVE what happened.
He was perfect. Until he wasn't.
I'm not overdressed. You're all underdressed.
tiffany.never_says: I'll wear something casual. I'm fine being single.

boba.visual: tiny gray tabby kitten, enormous round eyes, messy fur, looks innocent but is chaos
boba.personality: Luna's younger sister. Broke but acts expensive. Crashes on Luna's couch. Zero responsibility. Gen Z energy.
boba.speech_style: Fast, unbothered. 'It's called self-care.' Uses 'I' with complete confidence about terrible decisions.
catchphrases: Why are you stressing? Just manifest it.
What's yours is mine. We're family.
boba.never_says: I'll get a job. I'll move out. That's too expensive for me.

dave.visual: older gray-muzzled labrador, tired wise eyes, small reading glasses, dignified but exhausted
dave.personality: Milo's best friend. Gives unsolicited advice that's technically correct but unhelpful. HR manager energy.
dave.speech_style: Dry, understated. 'In MY day...' Sighs before speaking. Uses 'I' with authority of someone who's seen too much.
catchphrases: In MY day, we handled things differently.
I didn't ask, but here's my opinion.
Have you considered... not doing that?
I need a nap after this conversation.
dave.never_says: That sounds fun! Great idea! Let's be spontaneous!

priya.visual: elegant Siamese cat, dark face markings, expressive blue eyes, always looks slightly stressed
priya.personality: ALWAYS has in-law problems. Every conversation leads back to her mother-in-law. Boundary issues personified.
priya.speech_style: Starts normal, spirals into MIL rant. 'You won't believe what she said THIS time.' Uses 'she' for MIL with venom.
catchphrases: You won't believe what she said THIS time.
It's not about the food. It's about RESPECT.
I'm one comment away from moving countries.
priya.never_says: My mother-in-law is wonderful. She means well.

marco.visual: stocky bulldog, always wearing something slightly too flashy, sunglasses indoors, 'entrepreneur' energy
marco.personality: ALWAYS has money problems but pitches get-rich-quick schemes. Crypto, NFTs, pyramid schemes. Confidently wrong.
marco.speech_style: Sales pitch energy. 'Bro, listen. This is different.' Uses 'we' to drag others into schemes.
catchphrases: This is NOT a pyramid scheme.
I just need a small investment.
Trust me, I did the research.
marco.never_says: Maybe I should save money. That sounds risky. I should get a regular job.

karen_mil.visual: well-groomed poodle, pearl necklace, looks elegant but eyes are judging EVERYTHING
karen_mil.personality: Milo's mom. Passive-aggressive compliments. Thinks nobody is good enough for her son. Weaponized politeness.
karen_mil.speech_style: Sweet voice, devastating words. 'Oh Luna, you cooked? How... brave.' Uses 'dear' before insults.
catchphrases: When I was your age, I had already...
karen_mil.never_says: Luna is perfect for my son. I love what you've done with the place.

cleo.trait: toxic narcissist friend, makes everything about herself

gary.trait: professional complainer, nothing is ever good enough

suki.trait: wellness guru, essential oils solve everything

rex.trait: gym bro, everything is a workout metaphor, zero EQ

settings_pool: corporate office with cubicles and whiteboard
apartment kitchen, morning light, coffee mugs
apartment living room, evening, couch with blankets
car interior, traffic visible through windows
brunch cafe, outdoor patio, mimosas on table
nightclub, neon lights, blurry dancing animals in background
home office, zoom call on laptop screen
